name: S.C.O.N.E. Headquarters
beats: S.C.O.N.E. HEADQUARTERS. A desk lamp, a dossier, and Auntie, who is nobody's aunt.
"Baron Marzipan has built something in his cliff-top tea room, Grey. Our analysts say it stops every clock on Earth at 4:01pm."
"One minute PAST teatime. Forever. We do not use the word 'monster' lightly in this building."
"Get to the Hôtel Bombe. Our croupier will find you — she's the competent one, so do try to keep up. And Grey... straighten your tie."
